prompt:
A single roll of black PVC electrical tape sits on a wooden workbench, with the loose end pulled out slightly to show its width of about 19 mm. Next to it, a pair of wire cutters and a short length of wire with a freshly wrapped splice demonstrate how the tape is used to insulate connections. The tape has a matte finish and looks flexible and slightly stretchy.

Near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic with warm lighting, organized hand tools in the background, and a small plant adding color. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible markings on the inner core of the tape. The composition should clearly represent a standard roll of electrical tape suitable for insulating wire splices.
